notes: infinitiusa.com/vehicles/<segment>/<model>.html consumer site. Segment is 'crossovers' for QX60 (3-row mid-size) and 'suvs' for QX80 (full-size body-on-frame). SPORT trim has dedicated /trims/sport.html sub-pages for both models but Phase 4 scrapes the model-overview page per data file convention.
